parameters.query:
INSERT INTO bookings (
  customer_name,
  email,
  service,
  appointment_time,
  status,
  confirmed,
  confirmation_token,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.sql_customer_name }}',
  '{{ $json.sql_email }}',
  '{{ $json.sql_service }}',
  '{{ $json.sql_appointment_time }}',
  'booked',
  FALSE,
  '{{ $json.sql_confirmation_token }}',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING *;

parameters.subject: =Confirm your appointment: {{ $json.service }}
parameters.html:
=
SyStack

Confirm Your Appointment

Your booking is almost complete. Please confirm below so your appointment stays secured.

✓

Hey {{ $json.customer_name }},

You are booked for the appointment below. Confirm now to help prevent missed appointments and scheduling conflicts.

Service
{{ $json.service }}
Appointment Time
{{ $json.appointment_time }}
Confirm Appointment

If you do not confirm, your slot may be marked at risk or released depending on the business policy.

Automated booking and no-show prevention powered by SyStack.

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "message": "Booking created and confirmation email sent.",
  "booking_id": "{{ $('Merge Insert Result').first().json.booking_id }}",
  "customer_name": "{{ $('Merge Insert Result').first().json.customer_name }}",
  "email": "{{ $('Merge Insert Result').first().json.email }}",
  "service": "{{ $('Merge Insert Result').first().json.service }}",
  "appointment_time": "{{ $('Merge Insert Result').first().json.appointment_time }}",
  "confirm_link": "{{ $('Merge Insert Result').first().json.confirm_link }}"
}
